annotation.text: I don't think this should be the first section. I think the first section should be an overview of the general problem--that without some kind of guiding principle, AI-generated assets will drift away from brand fidelity and start looking like a thicket rather than a garden. There are many failure modes, and they all share one thing in common: enforcing a guiding principle by sheer willpower is exhausting--and prone to failure.
